category_sources: Official EasyRPG GitHub organization and Player manual describe EasyRPG Player as an interpreter for RPG Maker 2000/2003 games.
source_facts.description says it is an RPG Maker 2000/2003 games interpreter.
display_name_sources: Official manual title and GitHub repository name use EasyRPG Player/Player.
docs_sources: Official EasyRPG Player manual is dedicated documentation.
Official EasyRPG wiki is identified by the manual as additional project documentation.
repo_sources: Official EasyRPG GitHub organization lists Player as the RPG Maker 2000/2003 interpreter repository.
Official manual directs bug reports to github.com/EasyRPG/Player/issues.
tags_sources: Official EasyRPG materials describe Player as the runtime/interpreter for RPG Maker and EasyRPG games.
source_facts.description identifies RPG Maker 2000/2003 game interpretation.
